title: Factocrafty
description: A new tech mod, with each of the most advanced machinery
body:
![](https://imgur.com/JZ6ANVb.png)

<h3>

**A mod about creating and reinventing, adding machines that perform the most advanced processes, decorative blocks, power tools, 12 new ores, half of them being naturally generated, and many other usable additions.**

 <h4>

**The energy used in the mod is *Crafty Energy*, similar to the Energy Unit of IC2 and other mods inspired by it, which is currently possible to convert to the respective energy of the used mod loader, as well as the energy transformers from higher to lower energy tier.**

**For now use Just Enough Items to see the recipes and have a baseline of the mod's progress, a Wiki will be created to help with this issue**

**It is still in WIP, many of its features can be changed, despite being functional, and many others added.**

 

Factocrafty creative process was inspired by the concepts of mods like Build Craft, Industrial Craft 2, Mekanism and a bit in real life.
